title: The Private Life of Helen of Troy
writer: John Erskine, Robert E. Sherwood, Carey Wilson
actors: María Corda, Lewis Stone, Ricardo Cortez
plot: Queen Helen of Troy, in response to her husband Menelaus' lack of interest in her, elopes with Paris to Sparta. Menelaus, egged on by his henchman, starts a war with Paris, finally effecting the return of Helen. The time-honored c...
